text.title: Model Context Protocol — Architecture and Core Primitives — Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing `mcp-architecture` applied to a real-shape scenario.

section.title: Worked example: filesystem MCP server
section.p: Server exposing local file ops to Claude Desktop. Scope: local desktop host.

list.item: Primitives: tools=[read_file, write_file], resources=[file:// URI prefix], prompts=[] (none).
Transport: stdio (single-process subprocess of Claude Desktop).
Auth: none_local. Host process boundary is the trust boundary.
Version: 2025-11-25 pinned; upgrade plan recorded in spec.
Security: tool descriptions treated as untrusted prose; client UI renders them distinctly.
